stimulus:
Please read the following instructions carefully.In this study we are interested in how people make various types of decisions. During each trial of the study, you will be presented with two images of snacks. In each trial we will ask you to choose which of the two snacks you prefer, using your mouse cursor. Note that there are no right or wrong answers, so please decide according to your preferences. For example:

Press the button below to continue.

You will make the decisions using the computer mouse.Please start moving the cursor immediately after the options are displayed, even if you are not yet fully certain of your decision.Before you begin the actual task, you will do a few practice decisions.
You are now ready to begin the task.
Press the space bar to continue
